features: Jasmine Scent: A sweet and floral fragrance that brings the essence of fresh jasmine blooms into your home, creating a soothing and uplifting ambiance.
Handmade & Natural: Crafted with care, our wax melts are handmade using natural ingredients, making them a safe and eco-friendly choice for your home.
Long-Lasting & Highly Scented: Each 22g snap bar is designed to release a strong, enduring scent for hours of enjoyment.
Easy-to-Use Snap Bar: Simply break off a piece, place it in your wax burner, and enjoy the scent—customizable for any room size.
Eco-Friendly Soy Wax: Made from soy wax for a cleaner, safer burn that's gentle on your home and the environment.
description: Immerse your home in the enchanting aroma of Jasmine with our Jasmine Scented Wax Melts Snap Bar. These handmade wax melts capture the delicate and sweet fragrance of blooming jasmine flowers, perfect for creating a calming and romantic atmosphere. Crafted from natural soy wax, they ensure a long-lasting, eco-friendly burn.
